desc.desc: You summon a random sea creature and magically hurl at a target you can see within range. Roll 1d4 to determine what sea creature you summon, then make a ranged spell attack, on a hit the sea creatures effects occur. If you miss or the effects ends the sea creature is transported back to the waters it came from with an audible splash.

content: Tuna: The target takes 1d4 cold damage and 1d4 bludgeoning damage.
Electric Eel: The target takes 1d8 electric damage.

Crab: The crab clings onto the targets skin, continuously pinching the target. The target takes 1d4 piercing damage on the start of each of its turns for the next minute. The target may use spend an action to remove the crab, ending the effect early.

Octopus: The octopus attempts to cling onto the target’s face. The target takes 1d4 poison damage and must make succeed on STR saving throw, on a failure the target gets the blinded condition until the end of its next turn.

desc.desc: This spell creates {*} sea creatures. Should there be multiple, make a seperate attack roll for each one.

name-of-spell.name: Name of Spell

desc.desc: This spell creates an invisible, mindless, shapeless, Medium-size force that performs simple tasks at your command until the spell ends. The servant springs into existence in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It has AC 10, 1 hitpoint, a STR score of 2, and it cannot attack. If it drops to 0 hitpoints, the spell ends.

Once on each of your turns as a bonus action, you may mentally command the servant to move up to 15ft. and interact with an object. The servant is able to perform simple tasks that a human servant could do, such as fetching things, cleaning, mending, folding clothes, lighting fires, serving food, and pouring wine. Once you give the command, the servant performs the task to the best of its ability until it completes the task, then waits for your next command.
If you command the servant to perform a task that would move it more than 60ft. away from you, the spell ends.

name-of-spell.source: I made it the fuck up
